reasoning: Lactate clearance is the key limiter here, as evidenced by the 25W drop from 5-min to 20-min power. This specific workout targets improving your fatigue resistance and aerobic base while preparing you for the Cascade Springs segment of the Alpine Loop. Your last B2B ride indicates a recovering trend, so we'll push just enough to encourage adaptation.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 5 x (4 mins at 242-256W, then 2 mins at 201-218W), focus on controlled breathing and staying smooth while transitioning between effort levels

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
